analyses.tactical_narrative:
Mexico (Javier Aguirre, 4-3-3, counter style) vs Korea Republic (Hong Myung-bo, 4-2-3-1, counter style)
  Tactical matchup: counter vs counter
  Mexico: Second spell. Pragmatic, defensive-minded. Prioritises organisation over possession.
  Korea Republic: Former national team captain. Transition period after Klinsmann dismissal.

USA (Mauricio Pochettino, 4-3-3, pressing style) vs Australia (Tony Popovic, 4-3-3, counter style)
  Tactical matchup: pressing vs counter
  USA: High-profile appointment. Pressing system, demands high energy. Tactical upgrade.
  Australia: Relatively new. Replaced Graham Arnold. Building his own identity.

Scotland (Steve Clarke, 3-4-3, counter style) vs Morocco (Walid Regragui, 4-3-3, counter style)
  Tactical matchup: counter vs counter
  Scotland: Long tenure — excellent stability. Consistent performer. Hard to beat defensively.
  Morocco: World Cup 2022 semifinalist. Excellent defensive organisation. Counter-attacking threat.

Brazil (Dorival Junior, 4-2-3-1, possession style) vs Haiti (Marc Collat, 4-4-2, defensive style)
  Tactical matchup: possession vs defensive
  Brazil: Restored stability after turbulent period. More pragmatic than previous coaches.
  Haiti: Underdog. Will park the bus against top teams.

Turkiye (Vincenzo Montella, 4-2-3-1, possession style) vs Paraguay (Daniel Garnero, 4-4-2, counter style)
  Paraguay will absorb pressure and look to exploit space behind Turkiye's high line.
  Turkiye: Excellent Euros 2024 campaign. Italian tactical discipline. Technically strong setup.
  Paraguay: Solid CONMEBOL qualifying campaign.

Netherlands (Ronald Koeman, 4-3-3, possession style) vs Sweden (Jon Dahl Tomasson, 4-4-2, counter style)
  Sweden will absorb pressure and look to exploit space behind Netherlands's high line.
  Netherlands: Euro 2024 finalist. Dutch total football principles. Quality throughout.
  Sweden: Swedish pragmatism. Hard to break down. Strong set pieces.

Germany (Julian Nagelsmann, 4-2-3-1, pressing style) vs Ivory Coast (Emerse Faé, 4-3-3, possession style)
  Germany's high press will look to disrupt Ivory Coast's build-up play.
  Germany: Excellent Euros 2024 host. High pressing, vertical football. Germany rejuvenated.
  Ivory Coast: AFCON 2024 winner. Hero appointment after Peseiro sacking mid-tournament.

Ecuador (Sebastián Beccacece, 4-4-2, pressing style) vs Curacao (Frédéric Née, 4-4-2, defensive style)
  Ecuador's intensity should create chances but Curacao's deep block may frustrate.
  Ecuador: Aggressive pressing system. Physical, direct.
  Curacao: First World Cup. Will be extremely defensive against Germany and Ecuador.

Tunisia (Jalel Kadri, 4-3-3, defensive style) vs Japan (Hajime Moriyasu, 4-2-3-1, pressing style)
  Japan's press vs Tunisia's defensive structure — expect a physical battle.
  Tunisia: Disciplined. Will look to frustrate bigger sides.
  Japan: Long tenure — outstanding World Cup 2022. High energy pressing. Famous for giant-killing.

Spain (Luis de la Fuente, 4-3-3, possession style) vs Saudi Arabia (Herve Renard, 4-3-3, pressing style)
  Tactical matchup: possession vs pressing
  Spain: Euro 2024 winner. Young, dynamic squad. Tiki-taka evolved. Heavy favourites.
  Saudi Arabia: Famous for beating Argentina in 2022. High line, high press. Tactically brave.

Belgium (Domenico Tedesco, 3-4-3, possession style) vs IR Iran (Amir Ghalenoei, 4-3-3, defensive style)
  Tactical matchup: possession vs defensive
  Belgium: Last chance for golden generation. Tactically flexible with quality players.
  IR Iran: Pragmatic. Physical. Difficult to beat. Strong team spirit.

Uruguay (Marcelo Bielsa, 3-3-1-3, pressing style) vs Cape Verde (Bubista, 4-4-2, counter style)
  Tactical matchup: pressing vs counter
  Uruguay: El Loco. Most distinctive tactical identity in football. Extreme high press. Unpredictable.
  Cape Verde: Long tenure. Excellent AFCON campaigns. Will be dangerous on counter.

New Zealand (Darren Bazeley, 4-4-2, defensive style) vs Egypt (Hossam Hassan, 4-2-3-1, counter style)
  Tactical matchup: defensive vs counter
  New Zealand: Will be extremely defensive. Physical. Set piece threat.
  Egypt: Salah-dependent. Will look to exploit wide areas.

Argentina (Lionel Scaloni, 4-4-2, counter style) vs Austria (Ralf Rangnick, 4-2-3-1, pressing style)
  Tactical matchup: counter vs pressing
  Argentina: World Cup 2022 winner. Copa America winner. Tactically brilliant. Messi's last dance.
  Austria: Godfather of gegenpressing. Transformed Austria. Excellent Euros 2024.

France (Didier Deschamps, 4-3-3, counter style) vs Iraq (Jesus Casas, 4-2-3-1, defensive style)
  Tactical matchup: counter vs defensive
  France: Longest serving elite manager. Ultra pragmatic. Won 2018 WC. Finals machine.
  Iraq: Will be defensive. First World Cup in decades. Punching above weight.

Norway (Stale Solbakken, 4-3-3, counter style) vs Senegal (Aliou Cissé, 4-3-3, counter style)
  Tactical matchup: counter vs counter
  Norway: Haaland-dependent. Direct, physical, dangerous on transition.
  Senegal: AFCON winner 2022. Long tenure = excellent cohesion. Physical, direct, dangerous.

Jordan (Hussein Ammouta, 4-4-2, defensive style) vs Algeria (Vladimir Petkovic, 4-3-3, possession style)
  Tactical matchup: defensive vs possession
  Jordan: Will be defensive. AFCON final 2024 was overachievement. Organised.
  Algeria: Experienced. Former Switzerland manager. Rebuilding Algeria after AFCON disappointments.

Portugal (Roberto Martinez, 4-3-3, possession style) vs Uzbekistan (Srecko Katanec, 4-2-3-1, defensive style)
  Tactical matchup: possession vs defensive
  Portugal: Former Belgium manager. Excellent squad depth. Post-Ronaldo transition ongoing.
  Uzbekistan: First World Cup. Will be pragmatic and hard to break down.

England (Thomas Tuchel, 4-2-3-1, pressing style) vs Ghana (Otto Addo, 4-2-3-1, counter style)
  Tactical matchup: pressing vs counter
  England: NEW MANAGER — replaced Southgate. German pressing philosophy. Tactical upgrade expected.
  Ghana: Second spell. Physical, direct. Building young squad.

Panama (Thomas Christiansen, 4-4-2, defensive style) vs Croatia (Zlatko Dalic, 4-3-3, possession style)
  Tactical matchup: defensive vs possession
  Panama: Will be extremely defensive vs England and Croatia. Set piece oriented.
  Croatia: Long tenure. WC 2018 finalist, WC 2022 third place. Experienced. Modric era ending.

Colombia (Nestor Lorenzo, 4-2-3-1, possession style) vs Congo DR (Sébastien Desabre, 4-3-3, counter style)
  Congo DR will absorb pressure and look to exploit space behind Colombia's high line.
  Colombia: Copa America 2024 finalists. Excellent qualifying campaign. Dangerous side.
  Congo DR: Athletic, physical. AFCON semifinalists. Dangerous on the break.

Bosnia & Herzegovina (Sergej Barbarez, 4-2-3-1, counter style) vs Qatar (Marquez Lopez, 4-3-3, possession style)
  Bosnia & Herzegovina will sit deep and look to hit Qatar on the break.
  Bosnia & Herzegovina: Former national team striker. First major coaching role at senior international level.
  Qatar: Spanish influence. Qatar investing heavily in football infrastructure.

Switzerland (Murat Yakin, 3-4-3, possession style) vs Canada (Jesse Marsch, 4-3-3, pressing style)
  Tactical matchup: possession vs pressing
  Switzerland: Solid continuity. Led Switzerland to excellent Euros 2024 campaign. Tactically flexible.
  Canada: High energy pressing system. Former RB Leipzig coach. Brings European intensity.

Morocco (Walid Regragui, 4-3-3, counter style) vs Haiti (Marc Collat, 4-4-2, defensive style)
  Tactical matchup: counter vs defensive
  Morocco: World Cup 2022 semifinalist. Excellent defensive organisation. Counter-attacking threat.
  Haiti: Underdog. Will park the bus against top teams.

Scotland (Steve Clarke, 3-4-3, counter style) vs Brazil (Dorival Junior, 4-2-3-1, possession style)
  Scotland will sit deep and look to hit Brazil on the break.
  Scotland: Long tenure — excellent stability. Consistent performer. Hard to beat defensively.
  Brazil: Restored stability after turbulent period. More pragmatic than previous coaches.

Czechia (Ivan Hasek, 4-2-3-1, possession style) vs Mexico (Javier Aguirre, 4-3-3, counter style)
  Mexico will absorb pressure and look to exploit space behind Czechia's high line.
  Czechia: Relatively new appointment. Czech style — technical, structured.
  Mexico: Second spell. Pragmatic, defensive-minded. Prioritises organisation over possession.

South Africa (Hugo Broos, 4-4-2, defensive style) vs Korea Republic (Hong Myung-bo, 4-2-3-1, counter style)
  Tactical matchup: defensive vs counter
  South Africa: Experienced. Built Bafana Bafana into AFCON qualifiers. Disciplined structure.
  Korea Republic: Former national team captain. Transition period after Klinsmann dismissal.

  Tactical matchup: defensive vs possession

  Ivory Coast: AFCON 2024 winner. Hero appointment after Peseiro sacking mid-tournament.

  Germany: Excellent Euros 2024 host. High pressing, vertical football. Germany rejuvenated.
